sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93934" key="sialopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῐᾰλοποιός</orth>, in form <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σιελοπ-</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n93934.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">producing saliva</tr_>, Xenocr,ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:2:58:78" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58.78</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
